title: Surgeon Vacancy at Wockhardt Hospitals Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Wockhardt Hospitals Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Wockhardt Hospitals Holdings Services are looking for an experienced Surgeon based out of Delhi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Wockhardt Hospitals Holdings Services:
Wockhardt Hospitals Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wockhardt Hospitals Holdings Services!
